# Chip Huyen **AI x stuff** San Francisco, California, United States, US 500 connections, 305140 followers ## About Email is the best way to reach me! My focus is on ML/AI systems in production

Previously, I was with Snorkel AI and NVIDIA, started an AI infrastructure startup, and taught Machine Learning Systems Design at Stanford

My first English book, Designing Machine Learning Systems (2022), is an Amazon bestseller in AI and has been translated into 10+ languages

My new book, AI Engineering (2025), has been the most-read book on the O’Reilly platform since its launch
